## Checklist

- [ ] **PR title** follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/v1.0.0/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `feat!:`, `fix!:`, optional `type(scope):`, etc.). With **squash merge**, GitHub uses the PR title as the default merge commit subject—keep it conventional.
- [ ] **Releases:** see [README — Releases (maintainers)](README.md#releases-maintainers) for Release Please on `main`.
